proposal.title: Strategic Partnership Proposal v2: Renewal Stewardship as Your Wedge
proposal.supersedes: February 11, 2026 Strategic Partnership Proposal: Your Digital Workforce Roadmap

sections.heading: Unlocking Revenue Capacity
paragraphs: Alliance Insurance manages a book of 9,516 accounts and 16,744 policies, including roughly 3,946 renewing in the next 90 days. The current challenge is not a lack of effort — it is the operational lift required to deliver consistent renewal stewardship at scale across your full Producer book.

Indemn provides an "Insurance-Native" digital workforce. This v2 proposal centers on a single, high-leverage wedge: a Retention Associate that automates renewal stewardship for every Producer, every renewal. Once that's proven, we expand to lead capture and broader service automation.

sections.heading: Addressing the Implementation Gap
paragraphs: We recognize the bandwidth constraint with nine new hires absorbing your team's onboarding capacity. This roadmap is designed to deliver value with minimal change-absorption.
bullets: Wedge-first. Phase 1 sits behind your Producers — no customer-facing rollout, no new tools to learn. The Retention Associate works inside your existing renewal cadence.
Human-in-the-Loop. Every snapshot and pre-review email surfaces to the Producer for review and one-click send. No "hallucinations" reach clients.
Insurance-Native. Pre-trained on binding authority, surplus lines logic, NC-specific regulations, and your specific carrier list.

sections.heading: The Three-Phase Roadmap
sections.name: WEDGE (Months 1–2) — Renewal Stewardship
paragraphs: Focus: Producer-led renewals, automated snapshots and pre-review emails.
what_it_does: The Retention Associate (compound): Inbox + Knowledge + custom orchestration that assembles per-renewal snapshots from BT Core and drafts pre-review emails.
Outcome: Stewardship prep cut from ~30 minutes to ~5 minutes per renewal.

sections.name: WALK (Months 3–4) — Lead Capture
paragraphs: Focus: Stop the bleeding of missed inbound calls.
what_it_does: The Lead Capture Associate (bilingual): A Spanish + Vietnamese voice and chat Associate that ensures every inbound inquiry is answered.
Outcome: Reduce 100+ missed calls/week to fewer than 10.

sections.name: RUN (Months 5+) — Full Digital Workforce
paragraphs: Focus: Strategic Control and high-volume service automation.
what_it_does: High-Automation Tier: Absorbs the 24% of your call volume with structured workflows (Follow-up, Payment, COIs, Policy Info Update).
Internal Knowledge Search: Instant retrieval from your 72+ organized policy and procedure files.

sections.html:
Implementation Timeline

Phase 1: Setup & Grounding (Days 1–7)

The first week ensures the Retention Associate operates from a "Single Source of Truth."

  • BT Core Integration: Connected App OAuth setup. Real-time access to policies, renewals, and claims.
  • Producer Walkthrough (30 min): Map the renewal-prep workflow per Producer.
  • Carrier-Exit Cohort: Main Street America and NGM Insurance prioritized as the first proof set.

Phase 2: First Cohort Live (Days 8–30)

Active deployment for the 30/60/90-day renewal cohorts.

  • Snapshot Generation: Per-account coverage, policies-by-carrier, claims activity, last-touch dates.
  • Pre-Review Email Drafts: Surfaced for Producer review, edit, and send.
  • ROI Review (Week 4): 15-min check-in with Brian and the AI Roundtable.

Phase 3: Expansion Decision (Days 31–60)

Once the Retention Associate has proven its ROI, we make the Phase 2 decision.

  • Carrier-Exit Outcomes: Reported across the prioritized cohort.
  • Producer Training: On edit/send patterns and persistence-cadence configuration.
  • Phase 2 Scope: Define full bilingual or English-first Lead Capture deployment.

sections.heading: Implementation Roles & Commitment
rows: BT Core connection; per-Producer cadence config
Review first batch of snapshots + pre-review emails
15-min ROI review with Brian and the AI Roundtable
BT Core deep-integration; Phase 2 deployment plan

guardrails.heading: Operational Guardrails
items: Wedge-Risk Pilot: Phase 1 is offered month-to-month. We earn our place every month. No long-term commitment until Phase 3, and only if Phases 1 + 2 prove out.
No-Code Control: Your team can update FAQs, eligibility rules, and snapshot fields in real-time without IT tickets.
Insurance-Native: Pre-trained on binding authority, surplus lines logic, and NC-specific regulations.

sections.heading: Next Steps
items: Approve this roadmap to begin the Phase 1 configuration.
Schedule a 30-minute kickoff to walk through the renewal-prep workflow per Producer and authorize the BT Core Connected App.
